title: Communauté d'agglomération Rambouillet Territoires
summary: Communauté d'agglomération Rambouillet Territoires is the communauté d'agglomération, an intercommunal structure, centred on the city of Rambouillet. It is located in the Yvelines department, in the Île-de-France region, northern France. Created in 2017, its seat is in Rambouillet. Its area is 629.5 km2. Its population was 79,127 in 2019, of which 27,141 in Rambouillet proper.
text:
Communauté d'agglomération Rambouillet Territoires is the communauté d'agglomération, an intercommunal structure, centred on the city of Rambouillet. It is located in the Yvelines department, in the Île-de-France region, northern France. Created in 2017, its seat is in Rambouillet. Its area is 629.5 km2. Its population was 79,127 in 2019, of which 27,141 in Rambouillet proper.

Composition
The communauté d'agglomération consists of the following 36 communes:
